title: Quiz 01: Computer Basics
note: Practice quiz only. Marks are not officially recorded.

questions.question: A computer is mainly used to:
questions.explanation: A computer accepts data, processes it, stores it, and gives output.

questions.question: Which one is an input device?
questions.explanation: A keyboard is used to enter data into a computer.

questions.question: Which quality means a computer can work very fast?
questions.explanation: Speed means the computer can perform many operations quickly.

questions.question: Which device shows output on a screen?
questions.explanation: A monitor is an output device used to display information.

questions.question: Computer instructions are called:
questions.explanation: Software is a set of instructions that tells the computer what to do.
